common.recipeCountShowing: {count, plural, =0 {No recipes} one {# recipe} other {# recipes}}

home.heroSubtitle: Explore our collection of traditional and modern Filipino recipes, passed down through generations
home.featuredDescription: Our most loved dishes, carefully selected for you
home.categoriesDescription: Find recipes organized by meal type

seo.recipesListingDescription: Browse all published Filipino recipes with clear steps, times, and serving sizes on Sarap Kitchen.
seo.recipesPageIntro: Discover our collection of delicious recipes
seo.categoriesListingDescription: Explore recipe categories — from classics to modern Filipino dishes — and find your next meal.
seo.categoryPageDescriptionFallback: Filipino recipes in {name} — ingredients, instructions, and tips on Sarap Kitchen.
seo.blogListingDescription: Stories, tips, and news from Sarap Kitchen — Filipino cooking, pantry guides, and more.

blogPage.intro: Stories, tips, and culinary inspiration from our kitchen to yours.

about.title: About Sarap Kitchen
about.subtitle: Bringing the warmth of Filipino home cooking to your kitchen
about.storyText: Sarap Kitchen was born from a love of Filipino cuisine and a desire to share these beloved recipes with the world. Every dish tells a story of family gatherings, celebrations, and the simple joy of a home-cooked meal.
about.missionText: We believe that cooking should be accessible to everyone. Our recipes are carefully tested and written with clear instructions, whether you are a beginner or an experienced cook.

footer.description: Your destination for authentic Filipino recipes and culinary inspiration.
footer.newsletterText: Subscribe for new recipes and cooking tips

legal.attorneyReview: This information supports general compliance and is not legal advice. Have qualified counsel review these documents for your jurisdiction and operations.

cookieBanner.title: Cookies and audience measurement
cookieBanner.body: We use essential cookies so the site can function. If you choose Accept all, we also use analytics to understand traffic and performance (for example Vercel Analytics) and we may show personalized ads through Google AdSense, which uses cookies as described in Google’s policies. You can reset your choice by clearing site data for this domain. More information:

admin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this?

imageUpload.label: Upload
imageUpload.invalidType: Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.
imageUpload.tooLarge: Image must be 8 MB or smaller.
imageUpload.failed: Could not upload image. Ensure the cms-uploads bucket exists (see scripts/rls_and_storage.sql).

siteBranding.pageDescription: Branding, colors, fonts, and favicon for the public site.
siteBranding.title: Website name
siteBranding.description: Shown in the header next to the logo, footer, and browser titles (“Page | [name]”).
siteBranding.label: Site name
siteBranding.taglineHint: Short line under the site name in the header and footer (e.g. what you cook).
siteBranding.faviconHint: Square PNG, ICO, or SVG. Upload stores a public URL; browsers may cache—hard refresh after changes.
siteBranding.saveError: Could not save. Run scripts/add_site_appearance_columns.sql on Supabase if columns are missing.
siteBranding.loadErrorBody: Check your connection and Supabase site_settings table.

ads.title: Google AdSense
ads.description: Control where display ads appear on recipe pages. Ads only load for visitors who choose “Accept all” on the cookie banner.
ads.publisherHint: Format: ca-pub-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx (from AdSense Account → Account information).
ads.placementAfterIntro: After title block, before story (recipe pages)
ads.slotHint: Numeric ID from AdSense → Ads → By ad unit.
ads.policyBody: Use only official AdSense code, avoid clicking your own ads, keep enough spacing so ads are not confused with navigation, and follow Google’s program policies and ad limit guidance. See the AdSense Help Center for current rules.
ads.manyPlacementsWarning: You have many placements enabled. Too many ads can hurt user experience and may conflict with Google guidance; prefer a few well-spaced units.
ads.invalidPublisher: Publisher ID must look like ca-pub- followed by digits.
ads.invalidSlot: Each enabled placement needs a numeric slot ID from AdSense (often 10–13 digits).
ads.applySqlReminder: If ads settings are missing in the database, run scripts/legacy_schema_patches.sql on Supabase after rls_and_storage.sql, or apply schema.sql then rls_and_storage.sql for a fresh database. Then reload this page.
ads.loadErrorTitle: Could not load AdSense settings from the database.

pages.title: Static pages
pages.intro: Edit public static pages. Save, then use Preview to open the live page.
pages.editHint: Save, then open Preview to see the live page.
pages.sqlReminder: If saving fails, run scripts/legacy_schema_patches.sql on Supabase after rls_and_storage.sql, or apply schema.sql then rls_and_storage.sql.
pages.validationSection: Each section needs a heading and at least one paragraph.
pages.validationValue: Each value card needs a title and description.
pages.subtitle: Subtitle
pages.homeImageUrlHint: Any image URL (HTTPS). Supabase Storage or your CDN work well.

auth.signUpSuccess: Account created! Please check your email to confirm.
